headline: Estée Lauder (EL) Stock After Recent Slide Are Valuation Estimates Now Attractive
summary: If you are wondering whether Estée Lauder Companies stock is attractively priced or still demanding a premium, this article walks through the key numbers that matter for valuation. The stock last closed at US$84.81, with the share price down 5.4% over the past week, down 4.0% over the past month, down 20.6% year to date, but up 14.4% over the last year after large declines of 53.3% over three years and 71.1% over five years. Recent price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in...
